text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, I'm so nervous. It's almost time for the race!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna make sure I run cuter than
everyone else. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll give it my all, just like always, and charm
everyone! ♪
